## NextQuery class

Renders a next query item which receives the suggestion that will be rendered as a prop. It exposes a default slot to change the next query content. If the slot is not overridden, it will render the suggestion query by default.

<b>Signature:</b>

```typescript
export default class NextQuery extends Vue 
```
<b>Extends:</b> Vue

## Properties

|  Property | Modifiers | Type | Description |
|  --- | --- | --- | --- |
|  [events](./x-components.nextquery.events.md) |  | Partial&lt;[XEventsTypes](./x-components.xeventstypes.md)<!-- -->&gt; | Events list which are going to be emitted when a next query is selected. |
|  [highlightCurated](./x-components.nextquery.highlightcurated.md) |  | boolean | Indicates if the curated next query should be highlighted. |
|  [suggestion](./x-components.nextquery.suggestion.md) |  | NextQueryModel | The suggestion to render and use in the default slot. |
